body.purpose: All text, labels, values, instructions, metadata.

value.purpose: Raw coordinate values and data points.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (background, color, border-color, opacity).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Action button in the URL input group.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { padding: 12px 24px; background: #e8e6e3; color: #0d0d0f; border: 1px solid #e8e6e3; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'SF Mono','Segoe UI Mono','Roboto Mono',Menlo,monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0d0d0f; color: #e8e6e3; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8e6e3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Reset Button
components.description: Ghost-style button to reload a new image (in dark sidebar).
components.css: .ds-btn-reset { padding: 10px 24px; background: transparent; color: #e8e6e3; border: 1px solid #2a2a2d; border-radius: 0; width: 100%; font-family: 'SF Mono','Segoe UI Mono','Roboto Mono',Menlo,monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-reset:hover { background: #0d0d0f; border-color: #e8e6e3; } .ds-btn-reset:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8e6e3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: URL Input
components.description: Text input for entering an image URL.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-url" type="text" placeholder="Or enter image URL...">
components.css: .ds-input-url { flex: 1; padding: 12px; border: none; font-family: 'SF Mono','Segoe UI Mono','Roboto Mono',Menlo,monospace; font-size: 13px; outline: none; background: transparent; } .ds-input-url:focus { background: #f0eeeb; }

components.name: Info Row
components.description: Label-value data row with copy-on-click (on dark sidebar).
components.html: X Position420px
components.css: .ds-info-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 6px 8px; margin: 0 -8px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); background: #0d0d0f; color: #e8e6e3; } .ds-info-row:hover { background: #18181b; } .ds-info-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8e6e3; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-info-label { font-size: 12px; color: #6b6a68; letter-spacing: 0.2px; } .ds-info-value { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #8b8a88; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-align: right; word-break: break-all; margin-left: 16px; } .ds-info-value.highlight { color: #e8e6e3; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Coordinate Hero
components.description: Featured coordinate readout at the top of the sidebar.
components.html:
X420px
Y280px
%33.33% × 25.00%
components.css: .ds-coord-hero { padding: 16px 0 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e1e21; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-coord-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; } .ds-coord-label { font-size: 11px; color: #6b6a68; letter-spacing: 0.2px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-coord-value { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #e8e6e3; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-coord-pct { color: #8b8a88; }

components.name: Sidebar Header
components.description: Fixed header with crosshair icon at the top of the sidebar.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding-bottom: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e1e21; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-crosshair { width: 14px; height: 14px; position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-crosshair::before { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: #8b8a88; top: 50%; left: 0; transform: translateY(-50%); } .ds-crosshair::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 100%; background: #8b8a88; left: 50%; top: 0; transform: translateX(-50%); } .ds-header-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.8px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #e8e6e3; } .ds-header-sub { font-size: 10px; color: #6b6a68; }

components.name: Marker
components.description: Crosshair ring marking a clicked position on the image.
components.css: .ds-marker { position: absolute; width: 22px; height: 22px; border: 1.5px solid #fff; border-radius: 50%; background: transparent; pointer-events: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-marker::before, .ds-marker::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; background: #fff; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .ds-marker::before { width: 100%; height: 1px; } .ds-marker::after { width: 1px; height: 100%; }

narrative.overview: Pinpoint is a single-purpose measurement tool: drop an image, click a point, read the coordinates. The interface is fully dark — the chrome recedes so the image commands attention.
keyCharacteristics: Full dark theme — interface recedes, image commands
Monospace throughout — every character is a measured unit
Light-on-dark typography with warm off-white text
Coordinate hero readout as the primary data surface
White crosshair marker — visible on any image

rules.name: The Flat Rule
rules.body: All surfaces are coplanar. No shadows, no z-depth, no elevation.

dos: Do keep the interface dark (#0d0d0f) — the image is the only light source.
Do use light accent (#e8e6e3) for buttons and interactive states.
Do use monospace throughout — coordinates should tabulate.
Do keep the image area free of chrome — the image is the subject.
Do use direct click-to-copy on every data row.
donts: Don't mix light and dark surfaces — the entire chrome layer is a single dark tone.
Don't use colored accents — light = active, dark = rest.
Don't add dashboards, charts, or multi-panel layouts.
Don't wrap the image in frames, cards, or containers with padding.
Don't animate layout properties — ease only background, color, border-color, opacity.
